description: Create ai_core/hre/knowledge_files/world_knowledge.mk with 300+ facts across psychology, economics, music, food, space, medicine, philosophy
steps: Create world_knowledge.mk with proper header and format
Add psychology facts (cognitive biases, memory, learning, emotions)
Add economics facts (supply/demand, inflation, GDP, markets, crypto)
Add music facts (theory, instruments, genres, composers)
Add food/nutrition facts (vitamins, calories, food science)
Add space exploration facts (missions, rockets, planets, discoveries)
Add medicine facts (organs, diseases, treatments, anatomy)
Add philosophy facts (logic, ethics, famous thinkers, thought experiments)
findings: Created world_knowledge.mk with 335 facts across 7 topics: psychology (cognitive biases, memory, emotions), economics (fundamentals, markets, crypto), music (theory, instruments, genres, composers), food/nutrition (vitamins, food science), space exploration (missions, rockets, planets), medicine (organs, diseases, body systems), philosophy (logic, ethics, thinkers, thought experiments). 379 total lines.
